description: Create a structural engineering elevation drawing of a reinforced concrete beam in LibreCAD using millimeters. Draw a 5000mm x 600mm beam on layer 'CONCRETE' (Color: Gray/8) with the lower-left corner at (0,0). Include top and bottom longitudinal reinforcement on layer 'REBAR_MAIN' (Color: Red/1) using 40mm clear cover (lines at Y=40 and Y=560). Add vertical stirrups on layer 'REBAR_STIRRUPS' (Color: Green/3) starting at X=100 and spaced at 200mm centers along the beam length. Save the drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/rc_beam_elevation.dxf.
